targetPositioning: Enterprise AI quality operations specialist with chatbot evaluation, GPT scoring workflow, A/B testing design, human-review QA loop, and governance automation experience.
managerHiringProblem: Build a scientific and production-ready evaluation function that prevents low-quality or unsafe AI-agent behavior from reaching enterprise customers.

top3SellingPoints.title: 3+ years practical experience as ML Engineer, Data Scientist, Research Engineer, or ML/AI evaluation-related role
top3SellingPoints.managerValue: AI quality evaluation operations for enterprise chatbot and internal AI assistant workflows.

top3SellingPoints.title: Evaluation metrics beyond precision/recall
top3SellingPoints.managerValue: Defined chatbot quality metrics, GPT scoring categories, human review loop, and A/B reporting measures.

top3SellingPoints.title: Research or implementation experience in ML model evaluation or LLM evaluation
top3SellingPoints.managerValue: Built practical GPT/chatbot evaluation workflows combining scoring, human review, and metric tracking.

skillsToForeground: Build closed-loop AI quality workflows combining automated GPT scoring, human review, and prompt iteration.
Design live A/B routing, attribution, and reporting logic for AI platform evaluation.
Python/SQL-style pipeline inspection and validation as maintenance, not from-scratch engineering
AI coding tool assisted debugging as interview context only
Own production operations for customer-service AI chatbot platforms across global support markets.
Evaluate GenAI tools for NL-to-SQL feasibility, business usability, infrastructure dependency, and production-risk boundaries.
Coordinate learning data pipelines across Docebo, Jenkins, Python, Azure Blob Storage, ADX, and Workday reference data.
skillsToSuppress: evi-ai-coding-tool-assisted-debugging: interview only, not strong visible CV proof
evi-research-lab-management: too weak for this JD's scientist requirement
Raw TOMO, FIN, Trender Buddy, and internal benchmark score names should be replaced with external-friendly wording
claimsToAvoid: AI Evaluation Scientist with production ML ownership
PyTorch, JAX, or TensorFlow practical ownership
cvHeadline: AI Quality Operations / Conversational AI Evaluation Specialist with enterprise chatbot evaluation, GPT scoring, A/B testing, and governance automation experience.
summaryAngle: Stretch application. The CV should not try to look like a pure AI Evaluation Scientist. The strongest safe angle is enterprise AI quality operations: chatbot evaluation framework, GPT scoring workflow, A/B attribution metrics, production AI chatbot operations, and AI governance controls. Major ML/statistics/framework gaps must remain visible internally so the CV generator does not overclaim.
